name: Kellsey Pickleball
description: Kellsey Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Heber City, UT. There are 5 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to food, restrooms, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.

name: Southfield Park
description: Southfield Park is a place to play pickleball in United States, UT. There are 15 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Victory Pickleball
description: Victory Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Francis, UT. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Victory Ranch
description: Victory Ranch is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Heber City, UT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: Wasatch County Recreation Center
description: Wasatch County Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Heber City, UT. There are 6 indoor wood courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.
